title: AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM (13), PAGE 208, SECTION THREE, TITLE (A), SUB-PARAGRAPH (C) OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED AND  THIRTEEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5455 / 57 OG No. 45, 8091 (November 6, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3031, June 08, 1961 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM (13), PAGE 208, SECTION THREE, TITLE (A), SUB-PARAGRAPH (C) OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED AND THIRTEEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (13), page 208, Section three, Title (A), sub-paragraph (c) of Republic Act Numbered Sixteen hundred and thirteen is amended to read as follows:

"(13) Pototan Social Hall and Gymnasium. P 100,000.00"

SEC 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 8, 1961.
